title: Ledger Arc Field
prompt:
Create a production-ready Ledger Arc Field using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original background pattern is a quiet system of three fine ledger arcs behind a selectable locator. A reader chooses North, Center, or South using accessible controls; an indigo locator dot moves to the selected arc and a text status names its position. Keep the field useful as a reusable light Bento background rather than a decorative full-screen illustration. Use white and #F4F5F6 surfaces, #ECECEE lines, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Indigo is the only bright accent, and the card itself has no gradient.

Use a labelled radiogroup with native buttons, aria-checked, a polite live region, 44px targets, and a visible 3px focus ring. Animate only the locator with a spring at stiffness 300 and damping 24, and fade the status in 140ms ease-out. Keep all values deterministic and local; do not use timers, random data, storage, browser globals, remote assets, or network calls. Favor transform and opacity over expensive drawing changes.

At 320px, preserve a clear field and controls below it; at larger widths, broaden the calm canvas without positioning outside its container. Maintain logical keyboard order, AA contrast, and text labels so color is never the sole cue. Under prefers-reduced-motion, place the locator immediately and keep only a short opacity fade. Return full client code, pure CSS approximation, and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML:
*/ .ledger-arc{height:128px;max-width:340px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#f4f5f6}.ledger-arc::before{display:block;width:70%;height:60px;margin:24px auto;border:1px solid #d9d9dc;border-radius:50%;content:""}.ledger-arc button{min-height:44px;border:0;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.ledger-arc button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.ledger-arc *{transition:none}}
